text.title: gemini-api-integration Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for gemini-api-integration as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Calling model.generate_content immediately after upload_file without polling for state == "ACTIVE".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The Files API processes uploads asynchronously; the file is not ready until state transitions to ACTIVE. Calling before it is ready raises an error or gives partial/empty results. Always poll before analysis.

failure-mode.description: File uploads (video/audio) not waiting for state.name == "PROCESSING" completion before calling model.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Uploads are asynchronous; calling the model before the file transitions to ACTIVE state fails with errors or empty results.

failure-mode.description: Response blocked by safety filters without checking prompt_feedback.block_reason before accessing response.text.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Accessing .text on a blocked response raises ValueError. Always check block_reason first and log it for audit.

failure-mode.description: Enabling Google Search grounding by default without surfacing cost to users.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Grounding nearly doubles per-query cost; agents that enable it unconditionally blow budgets. Make it explicit and user-controlled.

failure-mode.description: Mixing google-generativeai SDK (v1) with google-genai SDK (v0.8+) in the same codebase.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Both packages define overlapping types and namespaces; import conflicts cause runtime failures. Standardize on one SDK version per project.

failure-mode.description: Assuming uploaded files via Files API persist beyond 48 hours.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Files expire after 48 hours; agents that cache file handles across sessions fail silently when the file is deleted. Store file names instead and re-upload if needed.

failure-mode.description: Not testing multi-tool function calling responses explicitly; assuming parallel tool execution.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Gemini supports function calling but does not guarantee the same parallel-execution semantics as OpenAI. Test your use case explicitly.
